transcript: My name is Thomas St-Petri and I'm here with Nikon to encourage travel photographers to look deeper. There's often more to our typical tourist destinations than meets the eye so I'm using a range of Nikon cameras and Nikon lenses to photograph above and below the surface to discover unique locations and deliver images from a different perspective. Underground shots you need to be more creative to create something unique out of sometimes nothing. Whereas the above ground is quite vibrant, very colourful, normally very lively places. I'm sure everybody who likes traveling knows the excitement of going to a place you've never been before. It's very important to look for that first image, for something different, something that no one else has done just yet. There's so many things that you might be missing because you're not looking. Maybe it's better to come come in look around first see war where and find that unique angle the special place and then maybe start thinking about shooting it after I would like this image series to inspire people to go out more to shoot shoot, to take pictures. We're all humans, we are creative in something. And if you like photography and I can inspire you to go out and shoot some more, I think that would be a pretty good achievement.
